headline: Amazon's Next Gold Mine Is Worth $1.3 Trillion: Transport Stocks Begin Paying For It
summary: BofA's Justin Post says Amazon Supply Chain Services opens a $1.3 trillion logistics TAM. Each 1% share = $13B in revenue. Transports stay under pressure.

raw.headline: Amazon's Next Gold Mine Is Worth $1.3 Trillion: Transport Stocks Begin Paying For It
raw.summary: BofA's Justin Post says Amazon Supply Chain Services opens a $1.3 trillion logistics TAM. Each 1% share = $13B in revenue. Transports stay under pressure.

headline: Amazon Expands Logistics Offering to External Shippers; Transport Stocks Slide
summary: Amazon. com Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) has rolled out its Amazon Supply Chain Services platform, opening up its logistics infrastructure to third-party shippers beyond its traditional marketplace sellers.
